recommendations.title: 32 Malasana Street
recommendations.overview: Malasaña neighborhood, Madrid, Spain, 1976. While political turmoil ravages the streets all over the country, the Olmedo family arrives in the big city and settles into their new apartment. They soon discover that they are not the only ones roaming i

recommendations.title: Veronica
recommendations.overview: In 1991 Madrid, after holding a séance at school, a teen girl minding her younger siblings at home suspects an evil force has entered their apartment.

recommendations.title: Cannibal
recommendations.overview: Carlos is a respectable man, the most prestigious tailor in Granada, Spain. His life is reduced to work and his main hobby is eating; but not just anything.

recommendations.title: Venus
recommendations.overview: Lucía, a club dancer on the run, takes refuge in a sinister building on the outskirts of Madrid where her sister Rocío lives with her daughter Alba.

recommendations.title: Entergalactic
recommendations.overview: Ambitious artist Jabari attempts to balance success and love when he moves into his dream Manhattan apartment and falls for his next-door neighbor.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Backbone
recommendations.overview: Spain, 1939. In the last days of the Spanish Civil War, the young Carlos arrives at the Santa Lucía orphanage, where he will make friends and enemies as he follows the quiet footsteps of a mysterious presence eager for revenge.

recommendations.title: The 4th Floor
recommendations.overview: A woman inherits a rent-controlled apartment and is terrorized by a neighbor.

recommendations.title: Pi
recommendations.overview: A mathematical genius discovers a link between numbers and reality, and thus believes he can predict the future.

recommendations.title: Truman
recommendations.overview: Tomás, who lives in Canada, travels to Madrid, Spain, to visit his old friend Julián. Both of them, accompanied by Truman, Julián's faithful dog, will share many surprising and emotional little moments, triggered by the hard situation Julián is going

recommendations.title: Asylum Blackout
recommendations.overview: A group of cooks at an asylum for the criminally insane get locked in with the inmates during a massive thunderstorm
